name: ytdl-mcp
description: Download audio/video from any yt-dlp-supported site, tag it, and transfer it to an SSH remote with rsync or scp.
long_description: Cross-platform single-binary MCP server. Downloads media with yt-dlp, embeds metadata and cover art, organizes by artist, and rsync/scp's the result to an SSH remote. yt-dlp and ffmpeg are auto-downloaded into a per-user cache on first run, so the bundle only ships the ytdl-mcp binary itself.

tools.name: youtube_download
tools.description: Download audio/video from a yt-dlp-supported URL, tag it, and rsync to an SSH remote.

tools.name: youtube_probe
tools.description: Inspect media metadata (title, duration, uploader, formats) without downloading.

tools.name: youtube_search
tools.description: Search YouTube with yt-dlp and return matching video URLs without downloading.

tools.name: youtube_stats
tools.description: Summarize ytdl-mcp download history, totals, file kinds, uploaders, and recent entries.

tools.name: youtube_search_ui
tools.description: Open an interactive YouTube search UI for selecting videos to probe or download.

remote.title: SSH remote
remote.description: SSH alias (~/.ssh/config) or user@host to transfer downloads to. Passwordless key auth required.

audio_dest_path.title: Audio destination
audio_dest_path.description: Absolute remote directory for audio downloads, e.g. /mnt/user/data/media/music/yt-dlp

video_dest_path.title: Video destination
video_dest_path.description: Absolute remote directory for video downloads, e.g. /mnt/user/data/media/movies/yt-dlp. Falls back to the audio destination if blank.

audio_format.title: Default audio codec
audio_format.description: Default codec when downloading audio: mp3, m4a, opus, flac, wav, or best.

ssh_opts.title: Extra SSH options
ssh_opts.description: Additional ssh options parsed with shell-word syntax, e.g. -i "~/.ssh/ytdl key" -o ProxyJump=media-bastion. Appended after -o BatchMode=yes. Malformed quoting is rejected. Optional.

staging_dir.title: Local staging dir
staging_dir.description: Local directory to stage downloads before transfer. Defaults to system temp.

archive_dir.title: Download archive dir
archive_dir.description: Where the use_archive download history lives. Defaults to the per-user state dir, usually ~/.local/state/ytdl-mcp.

history_path.title: Download ledger path
history_path.description: JSONL file where completed download calls are logged for youtube_stats. Defaults to downloads.jsonl in the per-user state dir.

plex_url.title: Plex server URL
plex_url.description: Optional Plex server base URL, e.g. http://plex.local:32400, used to add downloaded audio tracks to a Plex playlist.

plex_token.title: Plex token
plex_token.description: Optional Plex auth token for playlist/search API calls.

plex_playlist.title: Plex playlist
plex_playlist.description: Optional default Plex playlist title or ID to add downloaded audio tracks to. Can be overridden per youtube_download call.

auto_update.title: Auto-update yt-dlp
auto_update.description: Update yt-dlp at server startup when stale. Recommended on — each session relaunch self-heals against extractor breakage.

max_age_days.title: Staleness threshold (days)
max_age_days.description: Update yt-dlp when the installed version is older than this many days.

update_pre.title: Track nightly channel
update_pre.description: Update from yt-dlp's nightly pre-release channel instead of stable.

extractor_args.title: yt-dlp extractor args
extractor_args.description: Passed to yt-dlp's --extractor-args, e.g. 'youtube:player_client=android' for videos the default clients can't reach. Optional.

ytdlp_path.title: yt-dlp path
ytdlp_path.description: Use a specific yt-dlp executable instead of auto-resolution/auto-download. Optional.

ffmpeg_path.title: ffmpeg path
ffmpeg_path.description: Use a specific ffmpeg executable instead of auto-resolution/auto-download. Optional.

ytdlp_timeout_secs.title: yt-dlp timeout (seconds)
ytdlp_timeout_secs.description: Maximum runtime for each yt-dlp probe/download command.

transfer_timeout_secs.title: Transfer timeout (seconds)
transfer_timeout_secs.description: Maximum runtime budget for each transfer phase.

ytdlp_sha256.title: yt-dlp SHA-256 pin
ytdlp_sha256.description: Optional SHA-256 digest required for the resolved yt-dlp executable.

ffmpeg_sha256.title: ffmpeg SHA-256 pin
ffmpeg_sha256.description: Optional SHA-256 digest required for the resolved ffmpeg executable.
